name: Ceasar Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup French bread cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Wash and dry the lettuce.
2. Wrap and refrigerate.
3. Warm bread cubes in a 275°F oven, tossing until hard and dry but not burnt.
4. Mash garlic into the side of a large salad bowl.
5. Place egg into boiling water and boil exactly 1 minute. Remove with a slotted spoon and break up with a fork. Add to the bowl.
6. Add salt.
7. Add lemon juice, olive oil, and Worcestershire sauce. Mix well (makes about ½ cup dressing).
8. Add lettuce leaves; toss thoroughly.
9. Add romano cheese and pepper; toss again.
10. Arrange on two dinner plates. Garnish with croutons. Makes 2.
